sglang.title: [EAGLE] Refactor code for page size > 1 & more simplifications
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Unify the kv cache layout during the decode of the draft model for page size > 1 and page size =1. It changed the draft kv cache layout in both forward_batch.out_cache_loc and forward_batch.req_to_token_pool. This only affects the draft decode phase. If any attention backend builds the page table ba

sglang.title: Fix sampling for speculative decoding & simplify kernels
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Use a different coin for the final sampling in speculative sampling
Remove redundant int32 - int64 copy in tree kernels

Co-authored-by: Sehoon Kim <sehoon@x.ai>

sglang.title: Release sgl-kernel 0.1.9
sglang.author: merrymercy

sglang.title: [EAGLE] Fix draft kv cache layout for fa3 and topk > 1
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
The page table in FA3 for speculative decoding with topk > 1 is wrong. This PR fixed it.
It was wrong for bs >1 from the beginning (the first PR). You can reproduce the error by running v0.4.7. You can find that if you send the same requests, the acceptance length of bs=2 is much lower than the acce

sglang.title: [Eagle] Fix kernel call after updating speculative sampling kernels
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Following #7207, we change the kernel calls.

Use a different coin for the final sampling in speculative sampling
Remove some uncessary to(torch.int32)

Co-authored-by: Sehoon Kim <sehoon@x.ai>

vllm.title: [Kernel] GGUF MMVQ kernel for multiple input vectors
vllm.author: SzymonOzog
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
performance_comparison.pdf
Running some kernels in matvec mode for small input sizes is more beneficial than mma. Currently the heuristic is very lazy and safe, happy to take some inputs on how to make the kernel choice better

vllm.title: [BugFix] Don't catch BaseException when dumping execute_model errors
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
dump_engine_exception() is intended to dump pertinent state for diagnostic purposes when model_executor.execute_model() raises an error.
We should be catching Exception rather than BaseException here because a non-Exception implies failure due to some external signal such as SystemExit or KeyboardIn

vllm.title: [DOC] Add reasoning capability to vLLM streamlit code
vllm.author: Navanit-git
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Added reasoning/thinking process visualization to the vLLM Chat Assistant Streamlit interface.
This enhancement allows users to:

View the model's thought process in real-time
Enable/disable reasoning display via UI toggle
Persist reasoning history across chat sessions
Auto-detect model reas

vllm.author: qscqesze

We would like to propose official support for the MiniMaxM1ForCausalLM model within vLLM. This model shares the exact same architecture and inference behavior as MiniMaxText01ForCausalLM, and is essentially a variant with different weights.
To support this, we added an alias in the vLLM codebase tha

vllm.title: [V1] Change return type on get_multimodal_embeddings()
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The return type implied that None was a valid return value, but the
code does not treat it that way. sanity_check_mm_encoder_outputs() in
vllm.v1.worker.utils is called on the output and does not allow None.
While we're at it, also change the input parameter type to the sanity
check function. Previo

Ran tests on h100 and b200 with the correct kernel selected

vllm.title: [Fix] Fall back to Gloo when NCCL backend is unavailable
vllm.author: conroy-cheers
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
vLLM refuses to launch with CUDA device on systems without NCCL support (i.e. Jetson):
RuntimeError: Distributed package doesn't have NCCL built in

Previously I have been running vLLM on Jetson by doing a find-replace for nccl -> gloo in vllm/distributed/parallel_state.py, but submitting a

vllm.title: [doc] add project flag to gcloud TPU command
vllm.author: davidxia
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
in case user doesn't have one set in gcloud config which might be result in this error.
$ gcloud compute tpus tpu-vm ssh TPU_NAME --zone ZONE
ERROR: (gcloud.compute.tpus.tpu-vm.ssh) The required property [project] is not currently set.
It can be set on a per-command basis by re-running your command

vllm.title: [Wheel Size] Only build FA2 8.0+PTX
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Reduce wheel size by only building FA2 8.0+PTX instead of 8.0,9.0,10.0 etc.
376.35 MB -> 339.32 MB
This does cause a slowdown in the initial runs on a machine while the PTX is JIT compiled
(vllm) lwilkinson@gpu66:~/code/vllm$ vllm bench throughput --model RedHatAI/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-FP8 --loa
